name: Marco Rubio for President
subject: Watch: “Is Marco Rubio ______?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41688202:16674924876:m:1:1349778030:9705043BF042DDA6C792E86AAFAB84BC:r)
---
Dear Peter,
Last week was a historic week in my life. Millions of Americans watched my announcement speech, many hearing from me for the first time. Naturally, they had questions about me and my background, including: "Is Marco Rubio a conservative?" Absolutely! "Is Marco Rubio a Democrat?" No. So where did they turn? Google! [_**Watch this video to see me answer the top Google searches about me from last week :**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41688203:16674924876:m:1:1349778030:9705043BF042DDA6C792E86AAFAB84BC:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41688203:16674924876:m:1:1349778030:9705043BF042DDA6C792E86AAFAB84BC:r) -Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41688204:16674924876:m:1:1349778030:9705043BF042DDA6C792E86AAFAB84BC:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41688205:16674924876:m:1:1349778030:9705043BF042DDA6C792E86AAFAB84BC:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41688206:16674924876:m:1:1349778030:9705043BF042DDA6C792E86AAFAB84BC:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: I need to know where you stand today!
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

While growing up in my family's restaurant and pool hall in small, blue-collar Central, South Carolina, I never in my wildest dreams thought I might one day run for President.

But today, with such a vital need to secure America's future, I feel it's my duty to consider such an important idea -- I have both the record and the resolve to pursue that high office -- especially at this time when so much is at risk.

If you agree, I hope you'll act upon that conviction by supporting my testing the waters committee, **[Security Through Strength](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27278958:26237341841:m:1:877327319:A570EE57E5842928781A392F7151B20D:r)**.

I know that entering the race for the Republican nomination will be one of the hardest decisions of my life -- a huge, costly commitment of time, money, and effort -- _but it is a challenge I believe I am uniquely qualified to take on_.

If I decide to run, **it will be to win** \-- _not just make a point_. That's why I established **Security Through Strength** \-- to fund my travels around the country as I listen to Americans and gauge my support.

And that's why I'm contacting you, one of my key supporters. Before I make my final decision, I want to know if you stand with me.

**[Will you declare your support now by making a generous contribution of $25, $35, or even $75 to Security Through Strength right away?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27278958:26237341841:m:1:877327319:A570EE57E5842928781A392F7151B20D:r)**

Barack Obama's failed foreign policy of appeasement and retreat have only made things more dangerous for America in an already dangerous world -- and his out-of-control spending, growth of entitlements, and failure to fix our broken immigration system endanger our prosperity as well.

The next President must get our country moving in the right direction and fix what Barack Obama has broken - if you want that person to be me, **[please let me know today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27278958:26237341841:m:1:877327319:A570EE57E5842928781A392F7151B20D:r)**.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. Friend, I truly owe my success over the years to the strong support of generous friends like you - and I need your input again as I ponder my future. [**Will you step forward with a generous gift to Security Through Strength today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27278958:26237341841:m:1:877327319:A570EE57E5842928781A392F7151B20D:r) Thanks, Lindsey.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27278958:26237341841:m:1:877327319:A570EE57E5842928781A392F7151B20D:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWpD9Um1WN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWpD9Um1WN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWpD9Um1WN)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Lunch with me this weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend -

This is it.

This is your last chance to enter to win our Lunch with Jeb contest.

[**Friend , I want to see you down in Miami this weekend, but you have to contribute $3 and be entered now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2263:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2264:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

**If lunch wasn 't enough to get you to sign up, the airfare and hotel are on us, Jeb Jr. has thrown in tickets to the Marlins game, and Columba said the lucky winner will get to bring a friend of their choice.**

[**All you have to do is contribute $3 right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2265:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

But your time is running out, and unless you act now, you will miss out. [**So don 't delay, contribute $3 and enter.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2266:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Hope to see you in Miami,

Jeb

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2267:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=235&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://righttorisepac.org/join-jeb-miami/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here]( https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Thursday, April 9, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Wednesday, April 22, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Wednesday, April 22, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets (one for the winner and one for a guest of the winner’s choice) within the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two tickets to a local event with an approximate value of $1,000; lunch with Honorary Chairman Jeb Bush, with an approximate retail value of $50; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $2,275. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,275. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules]( https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/). The Sponsor is the Right to Rise PAC. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317.

name: Marlon Marshall, Hillary for America
subject: Your first chance to get involved in your area
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
It's go time: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend -- It's go time!

When we say this campaign is about every American, we mean it. We're going to be in all fifty states and the territories right from the start. And that's where we need your help.

Supporters like you are putting together events in every single state as part of our ramp up, and we want you to host one. **Getting set up is simple:****[All you have to do is sign up](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)****[, and an organizer in your area will be in touch to help you every step of the way](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0).**

If you've never volunteered before, this is an easy way to get involved -- once you sign up, your local organizer will walk you through inviting people, setting the agenda for the event, and making sure yours is a success. And no worries, it's completely free to host.

Why not go ahead and meet the other supporters in your area? You'll be an important leader in building this organization in your neighborhood.

**These are going to be some of our first big events, so don't miss out.[Watch this video about the program we're building, then sign up to host an event](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) Events like this are how we're going to build the teams that will win this campaign. Hillary's been on the road in Iowa and New Hampshire already, talking to supporters about getting involved in this campaign. **Take your cues from her -- start organizing now:** **[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/rampup/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** See you out there,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of State Campaigns and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1Mjg1MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMzc5MzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
